JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-07-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NORTHERN SUN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NONPARTY GREG KEMPTON TO PRODUCE BUSINESS RECORDS DESCRIBED IN THE SUBPOENA. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER MAY BE DEEMED TO BE A CONTEMPT OF THIS COURT. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT IT TO GREG KEMPTON FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SEND A COPY TO THE COURT (RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM). JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Mtn For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. VON RYAN REYES, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot (Tel: 408-286-0880) for defendant Northern Sun Associates, Inc.;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NORTHERN SUN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S Motion For Sanctions.

Defendant Northern Sun Associates stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for the defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to the sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling, as follows:

The court grants defendant Northern Sun Associates' motion for an order for nonparty Greg Kempton Construction, LLC ("Kempton Construction") to appear before the Court to state its argument for failing to comply with the Court's order to produce the business records described in the Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business Records ("Subpoena") filed on March 8, 2022. The hearing shall be on August 1, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 301 by videoconference through Zoom. Greg Kempton is ordered to appear at this hearing by videoconference through Zoom. The link for the videoconference appearance is on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/civil/law-motion. Sanctions of $1,485 are awarded against Kempton Construction. Defendant Northern Sun Associates is to serve a copy of the court's order on Greg Kempton by both personal and electronic service.

(The August 1, 2022 hearing is to proceed before whichever pro tem judge is assigned to the August 1, 2022 Discovery calendar.)

Counsel for defendant Northern Sun Associates is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NORTHERN SUN ASSOCIATES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO DEFENDANT NORTHERN SUN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION PURSUANT TO SEC. 2025.480(a) TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH A DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS FROM NONPARTY GREG KEMPTON CONSTRUCTION, LLC AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER DIRECTING NONPARTY GREG KEMPTON WITIN THITY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO PRODUCE THE BUSINESS RECORDS DESCRIBED IN THE SUBPOENA. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER MAY BE DEEMED TO BE A CONTEMPT OF THIS COURT.

DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF 2025.408(g) SANCTIONS MAY ONLY BE ASSESS AGAINST A PARTY.

COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SUBMIT IT TO GREG KEMPTON FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SEND A COPY TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com).

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
